name: Bread Pudding
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Bread, cut into 1-inch pieces (about 2 slices)
recipeInstructions:
- Makes 4 servings of about 1/2 cup each
- Contains 146 calories per serving using white bread
- Contains 140 calories per serving using whole-wheat bread
1. Place the bread pieces in a 1-quart casserole dish.
2. Sprinkle raisins over the bread.
3. Mix sugar and cinnamon, then stir into the egg.
4. Add vanilla to the egg mixture.
5. Heat milk until warm (do not boil). Stir the warm milk slowly into the egg mixture.
6. Pour the mixture evenly over the bread.
7. Bake at 325°F (slow oven) for about 40 minutes, or until a knife inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Serve warm or cold.
